text:
Besties, Polly just drank her morning matcha and she is FOCUSED 🍵✨ We pushed some cozy updates to the repo today!

🧠 Polly’s brain got a major glow-up with new embeddings and system prompts (she understands the assignment better now).

🍯 We fixed the math on pollen buckets—credits now flow smoother than honey. No more splitting headaches.

👾 Plus, for our dev friends: we unlocked the secret menu. Hidden model support and legacy Claude versions are live.

Go build something wholesome today. 🌸

Link in bio to read the changelog!
